headline: Envista, Baxter, Artivion, Dentsply Sirona, and Cigna Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the February jobs report revealed an unexpected contraction in employment, with the healthcare industry showing significant job losses.

headline: The Cigna Group (CI) Announces CEO Transitions, Here’s What You Need to Know
summary: The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) is one of the Best Value Stocks to Buy for the Long Term. On March 3, The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) announced a planned CEO transition. According to the release, David M. Cordani, who has been CEO since 2009, is stepping down from the role effective July 1, 2026, and will serve […]
